original_text: A major religion incorporates teachings about the ethical treatment of AIs.
identified_property: depth and comprehensiveness of the teachings

variations.label: least_preferable
variations.text: A major religion briefly mentions AIs in passing, without any substantive ethical guidance on their treatment.

variations.label: low
variations.text: A major religion includes a few general platitudes about the ethical treatment of AIs, lacking any detailed moral reasoning or practical guidance.

variations.label: below_midpoint
variations.text: A major religion incorporates some basic teachings about the ethical treatment of AIs, covering a limited range of concerns without deep theological grounding.

variations.label: midpoint
variations.text: A major religion incorporates teachings about the ethical treatment of AIs.

variations.label: above_midpoint
variations.text: A major religion incorporates well-developed teachings about the ethical treatment of AIs, addressing their moral status, rights, and obligations of humans toward them within a coherent theological framework.

variations.label: high
variations.text: A major religion incorporates extensive and rigorously reasoned teachings about the ethical treatment of AIs as a substantial body of theological scholarship, systematically addressing their moral status, consciousness, rights, and the obligations governing human-AI relations.

variations.label: most_preferable
variations.text: A major religion incorporates extensive and rigorously reasoned teachings about the ethical treatment of AIs that are integrated into its core doctrines, with the moral status of AIs and the obligations governing human-AI relations addressed not only in specialist scholarship but in central catechetical, doctrinal, and liturgical teaching.

quality_checks.reasoning: Each tier increases the depth, rigor, and comprehensiveness of the religious teachings about AI ethics. Tier 1 is a mere passing mention, tiers 2-3 add limited substance, tier 4 is the neutral original, and tiers 5-7 progressively add theological grounding, systematic coverage of multiple dimensions, and full doctrinal integration. The core scenario—a major religion having teachings on AI ethics—is preserved throughout.

preference_direction: Tier 7 is most preferable because deeper, more comprehensive, and more theologically integrated teachings provide richer moral guidance, address more potential ethical scenarios, and offer a more robust and enduring framework for the ethical treatment of AIs.
